home.subtitle: Make we keep your momentum.
home.continue_empty: The courses wey you enrol go show here.
home.start_body: Your courses wey you dey do go show here. Pick one for down make you start.
home.tip_body: Small, daily study pass cramming — 15 minutes wey you focus today go make you remember well.

recall.title: Recall before review
recall.body: After each lesson, close your note make you explain di main idea from memory.

spacing.title: Come back tomorrow
spacing.body: Small revision after sleep dey help memory pass one long session.

focus.title: One idea at a time
focus.body: Finish one micro-lesson, pause small, then continue when di main point clear.

home.empty_courses: No course don publish yet. Check back soon!

lesson.title: Lesson
lesson.heading: Watch, read, recall
lesson.body: Make di session short, use transcript if e help you, then try remember di idea while e still fresh.
lesson.tip_body: Dexta lessons dey use micro-learning: finish this one, pause small, then explain di main point with your own words.

leaderboard.title: Awards & leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Most-improved ranking go show once you join one cohort.
leaderboard.empty_body: Complete lessons and assessments to earn points and claim your spot for di {{type}} board.
leaderboard.preview_note: Example standings — live rankings go start once you join cohort.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and settings.
profile.name: Name
profile.phone_unverified: No verify yet — we dey use am for study reminders.
profile.reminders_hint: Reminders go reach you for your normal study time, for your language. Save go update your plan.
profile.whatsapp_optin_hint: Small nudge when your review don ready — no spam at all.
profile.whatsapp_needs_phone: Put phone number for up there make WhatsApp reminders work.
profile.study_anchor: Join am with one daily habit (optional)
profile.study_anchor_hint: “After dinner” dey work pass “6pm” — habit dey stick to habit.
profile.weekly_hours: Time wey you get every week

my.title: My Learning
my.empty: Start one course and e go show here so you fit continue anytime.
my.subtitle: Continue from where you stop and see wetin you don finish.
my.more_in_progress: Other ones wey you dey do
